body:
## Rationale

George Kollias is the world's fastest verified metal drummer (280 BPM single strokes, Guinness certified). 'whats-in-george-kollias-kit' exists as a gear-profile article, but there is no album-specific editorial article for him or Nile.

GSC opportunity: 'george kollias drum setup', 'nile drummer gear', 'george kollias speed' — all queries where an album-specific deep-dive significantly outperforms a generic gear card.

Pattern: Same strategy as Matt Greiner (15.79% CTR after album article) and Joey Jordison (128 impr article strategy from #1380). George Kollias has a uniquely strong search signal ('fastest metal drummer' AI queries cite him by name).

Confirmed NOT in any open proposal after dedup sweep against 50 open seo-proposals.

## Suggested article

Slug: george-kollias-nile-annihilation-drum-setup
Target URL: /articles/george-kollias-nile-annihilation-drum-setup

Focus album: Nile — 'Annihilation of the Wicked' (2005)
- George Kollias's first studio album with Nile
- Considered a landmark in extreme metal drumming for its speed and precision
- Tracks: 'Cast Down the Heretic', 'Lashed to the Slave Stick', 'User-Maat-Re'
- Kit at time: Tama Starclassic Maple, Meinl cymbals, DW 9002 double pedal

Key sections:
1. Album context + drumming style
2. Full gear breakdown (drums, cymbals, pedals, sticks)
3. Signature techniques (blast beats, hyper-fast double bass, polyrhythms)
4. FAQ: 'How fast does George Kollias play?', 'What drums does George Kollias use?', 'What makes Kollias unique?'
5. Internal links to /drummer/george-kollias, /technique/blast-beats/drummers, /vs/george-kollias-vs-flo-mounier

## Data for implementation

George Kollias (id: from extendedBios.js — search george-kollias):
- Band: Nile
- Genre: Technical/Brutal Death Metal
- Kit: Tama Starclassic Maple (later Tama Starclassic Walnut/Birch)
- Cymbals: Meinl
- Pedals: DW 9002
- Sticks: Vic Firth (later Vic Firth GK signature)

File to add to: packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js

Schema: Article + FAQPage + MusicAlbum (about Nile - Annihilation of the Wicked) + BreadcrumbList

## Quality gate
- 600+ words
- FAQ with 4+ Q&As targeting speed/gear/technique queries
- Internal links: /drummer/george-kollias, /technique/blast-beats/drummers, relevant /vs/ page
- datePublished set, dateModified set

## Verify
1. /articles/george-kollias-nile-annihilation-drum-setup returns 200 with content
2. Google Rich Results Test shows Article + FAQPage schemas
3. Title includes 'George Kollias' + 'Drum Setup' / 'Nile' for head-term match
4. At least 3 internal links in body
5. Entry in albumArticles.js has all required fields (slug, title, drummer, band, etc.)

## Done
New article added to packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js with slug 'george-kollias-nile-annihilation-drum-setup' and content file deployed.
title: SEO: George Kollias drum setup article — Nile, fastest verified metal drummer, no album article
